---
title: "Audit Target: xrd"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.panel-tabset}

## Executive Summary

The data quality audit for the X-ray Diffraction (XRD) dataset indicates an exceptional level of stability and adherence to established research protocols. The analysis, which covers mineral phase identification and crystallinity indexing across various agricultural biomass samples, yielded no flagged anomalies or statistical deviations. Automated monitoring through Evidently AI confirms that all key metrics—including peak intensity ratios and signal-to-noise levels—remain within historical control limits.

The absence of flagged records suggests that both the instrumentation calibration and the sample preparation procedures (such as milling and mounting) are consistently producing high-fidelity data. There are no indications of temporal clustering or provider-specific variations that would necessitate intervention. Consequently, the dataset is considered fully validated for use in downstream mineralogical characterization and thermochemical conversion studies.

## Evidently Profile

Evidently report not found.

## Flagged Observations

No flagged observations found for this target.

## Custom Visuals

Discovered assets:

- [xrd_distribution.html](../assets/exports/plots/composition/xrd_distribution.html)

:::
